---
title: "EMPA Sea Level Rise Analysis"
author: "Brooke Fulkerson"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{EMPA Sea Level Rise Analysis}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(EMPAFunctionAnalysis)
```

# Load Data

```{r load-data}
wetland_extents <- load_wetland_extents()
CRAM <- load_cram_data()
Veg_metadata <- load_veg_metadata()
GIS_data <- load_gis_data()
```

# Clean Data

```{r clean-data}
wetland_extents <- order_wetland_extents(wetland_extents)
veg_metadata_clean <- Veg_metadata |>
  clean_veg_metadata() |>
  order_veg_metadata()
GIS_data <- order_gis_data(GIS_data)
```

# Figures

## CRAM CDFs

```{r cram-index}
plot_cram_cdf(
  CRAM,
  state_col = "indexscore",
  empa_col = "EMPA_index",
  title = "Statewide CRAM Scores 2014 - 2024",
  x_label = "CRAM Index Score"
)
```

```{r cram-biotic}
plot_cram_cdf(
  CRAM,
  state_col = "biotic_structure",
  empa_col = "EMPA_bio",
  title = "Statewide Biotic Attribute Scores 2014 - 2024",
  x_label = "Biotic Attribute Score"
)
```

```{r cram-physical}
plot_cram_cdf(
  CRAM,
  state_col = "physical_structure",
  empa_col = "EMPA_phys",
  title = "Statewide Physical Attribute Scores 2014 - 2024",
  x_label = "Physical Attribute Score"
)
```

## Vegetated Cover

```{r veg-cover}
plot_veg_cover(veg_metadata_clean, year = "2023")
```

## Buffer Land Cover

```{r buffer-500}
plot_buffer_landcover(GIS_data, buffer_size = "500 m")
```

```{r buffer-30}
plot_buffer_landcover(GIS_data, buffer_size = "30 m")
```

## Wetland Habitat by Region

```{r wetland-north}
plot_wetland_habitat(wetland_extents, region = "North")
```

```{r wetland-central}
plot_wetland_habitat(wetland_extents, region = "Central")
```

```{r wetland-south}
plot_wetland_habitat(wetland_extents, region = "South")
```

# Scoring

```{r scoring}
dashboard_table_slr <- calculate_function_slr(
  CRAM, veg_metadata_clean, GIS_data, wetland_extents
)

head(dashboard_table_slr)
```
